metadata.name: Medication Adherence Gamification System
metadata.focus: Evening (6:30 PM) meds critical for senna + mirtazapine therapeutic effect

on_time.message: Therapeutic window hit! Senna + Mirtazapine at peak effectiveness.

within_15min.message: Still in optimal window. Well done!

within_1hour.message: Still acceptable but approaching edge of window.

late.message: Outside optimal window. May reduce effectiveness. Focus on tomorrow!

missed.message: Dose missed. What happened? Let's fix it.
No worries, 6:30 PM is the priority.

streaks.perfect_day: Both meds on time (6:30 PM = 100 pts, 9 AM = any)
streaks.perfect_evening: 6:30 PM meds on time (5+ days = 🏆 badge)
streaks.consistent: Taken same time each day (±5 min variance = 🎯 consistency bonus +10 pts)

badges.name: ⏰ Punctuality Master
badges.requirement: Hit 6:30 PM within 5 minutes for 5 consecutive days

badges.name: 🔥 7-Day Streak
badges.requirement: Take 6:30 PM meds every day for 7 days (any time)

badges.name: 🎯 Consistency King
badges.requirement: Take 6:30 PM meds within ±5 min same time for 10 days

badges.name: 💪 Comeback
badges.requirement: Miss a dose, then hit 5 in a row after

recommendations_engine.if_trending_down: Gentle check-in: What changed? How to help?

critical_optimization.focus: 6:30 PM meds MUST be on-time for therapeutic effect (senna + mirtazapine)

strategy_1_prewarning.action: Add 6:15 PM pre-reminder ('15 mins to meds')

strategy_2_habit_stack.trigger: If energy is low at 6:30 PM
strategy_2_habit_stack.action: Stack to dinner prep (6:00 PM: meds on table → cook → eat → done)

strategy_3_environment.action: Visible setup: meds out at 6:00 PM, cup of water ready

sections.name: 6:30 PM Meds (CRITICAL)
sections.format: Avg time taken: [TIME] | Score: [POINTS] | Badge: [BADGE] | Analysis: [MESSAGE]

sections.name: Tomorrow's Optimization
sections.format: Based on your pattern: [SPECIFIC ACTION ITEM]

sections.name: Celebration/Encouragement
sections.format: [Uplifting message tailored to this week's data]

weekly_sample_report.example:
📊 Weekly Score: 78/100 | Grade: C | Trend: ↑ Improving!

🚨 6:30 PM Meds (Senna + Mirtazapine):
Avg time: 6:47 PM (+17 min late)
Score: 75 points
Badge: ⚠️ Getting Late
→ You're consistently taking meds around 6:45-7:00 PM. While the meds still work, hitting 6:30-6:35 would optimize therapeutic effect.

✅ 9 AM Meds: 65 points (taken, but timing variable)

🔥 Streaks: 2-day evening streak

💡 Tomorrow's Fix:
We suggest adding a 6:15 PM pre-reminder (just a gentle ping). This should help you hit the 6:30-6:40 window. Try it for 3 days?

🎯 You're improving! Last week was 72/100, this week 78. Keep the momentum!
